descriptionTemplate:
This talent is only effective in the {Astral Reign} stages.
This Awakener's CON, ATK, and DEF +[Arg1]%, and they gain [Arg2] Keyflare upon their first {Rouse}.
Whenever Murphy: Fauxborn deals DMG, inflict {Sacrifice} stacks equal to [Arg3]% of DMG dealt on the target. {Life Seal} state's {Birth Ritual} stack increase effect is doubled.
When there are 1/2/3 other {Lemurian} Awakeners in the team: Max HP +6%/15%/30%; gain Shield equal to 50%/125%/250% of Murphy: Fauxborn's DEF after any {Lemurian} Awakener uses Exalt. Limited to once per turn; does not benefit from Shield Generation Boost.
